recipes.title: Tomato Basil Pantry Pasta
recipes.summary: A bright, fast dinner built from the things that are usually already waiting around.
steps: Boil pasta in salted water until just tender.
Warm olive oil with sliced garlic, then add chopped tomatoes.
Toss pasta with the sauce, basil, and a splash of pasta water.
Finish with parmesan and black pepper.

comments.body: Save a little pasta water. It makes the sauce cling beautifully.
